summary: Dual-read migration path lacks explicit compatibility and cleanup boundaries.

findings.evidence: Legacy and modern models are handled together without defined migration stage or removal trigger.
findings.minimal_fix: Define staged migration milestones: dual-write, verification window, legacy-read removal, and cleanup.
findings.verification: Add migration checkpoint tests validating display name parity before legacy removal.

findings.evidence: Display name logic spans multiple model versions, expanding change impact for simple updates.
findings.minimal_fix: Introduce one normalized user view model and map each schema version into it.
findings.verification: Run regression tests for legacy-only, modern-only, and mixed data inputs.

findings.evidence: No explicit compatibility tests are defined for migration edge states.
findings.minimal_fix: Add integration tests for migration boundary scenarios and fallback behavior.
findings.verification: Execute migration test matrix and confirm deterministic display output.
